title: Internal Error: ../V3Number.cpp:2338: Number operation called with non-logic (double or string) argument:
body:
Can you attach an example that shows the issue?  (Must be openly licensed, completely self-contained and self-checking so can directly run what you provide. Ideally use test_regress format, see https://veripool.org/guide/latest/contributing.html?highlight=test_regress#reporting-bugs

```
module tb_wrapper #(parameter INDEX = 4096);
  parameter CONFIG_INST_PATH =   $sformatf("*.test_wrapper[%0d]*", INDEX);  
endmodule : tb_wrapper
module tb_top;
  tb_wrapper    tb_wrapper_inst();
endmodule : tb_top
```

What 'verilator' command line do we use to run your example?

```
verilator -error-limit 1 -Wno-fatal --sv --timing --cc --top-module tb_top test.sv
%Error: Internal Error: test.sv:2:34: ../V3Number.cpp:2338: Number operation called with non-logic (double or string) argument: '"*.test_wrapper[4096]*""
                                                     : ... note: In instance 'tb_top.tb_wrapper_inst'
    2 |   parameter CONFIG_INST_PATH =   $sformatf("*.test_wrapper[%0d]*", INDEX);  
      |                                  ^~~~~~~~~
```

What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?

```
Verilator 5.041 devel rev v5.040-73-g83ff8e13b
```

What OS and distribution are you using?

```
Linux 4.18.0-553.22.1.el8_10.x86_64
```
